prestazioni: Engine: B202L (2.0L 16V turbocharged inline-4) with forged internals including Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (8.5:1 CR), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and ARP head studs for 300+ hp reliability on E85.
Turbocharger: Garrett GT2860RS-5 (ball-bearing, .64 A/R turbine housing) with custom 3" stainless downpipe and Tial 44mm external wastegate for spool under 3,000 RPM and 28 psi peak boost.
Fuel System: Bosch 044 high-flow fuel pump, Siemens DEKA 80lb/hr injectors, and Haltech Elite 2500 ECU with flex-fuel sensor for precise E85 mapping and launch control.
estetica: Body Kit: Saab Design USA "900 Aero" widebody conversion with carbon fiber front splitter, rear diffuser, and custom 2.5" fender flares to fit 9.5" wide BBS RS-GT wheels (ET20 offset).
Suspension: Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (SAAB 900-specific valving) with polyurethane bushings and custom subframe reinforcement plates for reduced flex under hard cornering.
Interior: Recaro SRD-E full bucket seats with Schroth 6-point harnesses, Momo Prototipo steering wheel (350mm), and custom aluminum gauge pod housing AEM X-Series wideband and boost gauges.
